title: Lime, Basil, & Mandarin Room Spray 100ml, Luxury Fragrance, Perfume Air Freshener, Spritzer Mist Spray, Odour Neutraliser, Room Fragrance, Room Fresheners For Home
features: TRANSFORMATIVE LUXURY ROOM SPRAY: Bring an opulent ambience to any room with our 100ml room spray fragrance luxury. More than a simple air freshener, our product offers a high scent, akin to a perfume-grade fragrance that enhances your home, office, or work area. Immerse yourself in this lavish experience with our room sprays for home use.

ETHICAL BABY POWDER ROOM SPRAY: Proudly cruelty-free, mineral oil-free and 100% vegan, our lime basil and mandarin and all other room spray blends ethical values with sophisticated scents. It doubles as an air freshener for bathrooms or air fresheners for home delivering a long-lasting freshness throughout your home or office without compromising your principles.

SUPERIOR AND LASTING FRESHNESS: Experience enduring freshness with our premium room air freshener. Delivering a potent and lasting scent with each spritz, it works beautifully as an air freshener for home sprays, bathroom freshener, or even a fabric freshener spray, making your environment feel revitalised at all times.

ADAPTABLE AND PRACTICAL: Our versatile luxury room spray elevates everyday living. Great for use as an air spray or fabric spray on linens, upholstery, or even carpets. This room spray air freshener ensures your space maintains a fresh and inviting scent, offering a slice of luxury to uplift the essence of your life.

EXPERIENCE THE VERSATILITY: Our room sprays serves as a multi-purpose solution, perfect as an air freshener for bathrooms or home air freshener. Whether you're freshening up your home, revitalising your fabric or even using it as a reed diffuser refill, every corner of your life can resonate with the hint of opulence our product brings.
description: Product Description Elevate your sensory experiences with our premium fragrance oils, thoughtfully crafted in the UK. Whether you're into candle making, soap crafting, bath bombs, wax melts, aromatherapy, or simply enhancing your home's ambiance, Essican Purelife fragrance oil is the perfect choice for you. Previous page Next page 1 VERSATILE OILS 2 DIY CANDLE 3 BATH 4 DIFFUSE Experience True Aromatherapy Bliss with Essican's Fragrance Oils Dreams Fragrance Oil Buying Options Pear Drops Fragrance Oil Buying Options Fudge Fragrance Oil Buying Options Snowman Fragrance Oil Buying Options Oils for Soap Making ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Bath Oil ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Oil for Burners ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Oil for Diffuser ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Candle Scent Oils ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Versatile Usage Craft soap bars, bath bombs, and humidifier oil for diffuser creations. Enhance homemade projects and home fragrance experiences. Ethical Standards Essican Purelife Fragrances are cruelty-free and vegan-friendly, aligning with ethical values. Skin Application Warning Not recommended for direct skin application. Designed for soap and bath bomb making. Packaging Fragrance oils are packaged in amber plastic dropper bottles to maintain product integrity and potency. Aromatic Collection Discover a diverse range of essential oil perfume scents, including musk essential oil and fragrance oil. Personalize your self-care experience. What are the primary uses for Essican Purelife's Fragrance Oils for Diffuser? Essican Purelife's Fragrance Oils for Diffuser are versatile and can be used for various purposes, including candle making, soap crafting, bath bomb creation, enhancing slime, wax melts, home fragrance, and oil burners. What is the size and packaging of these fragrance oils? These candle fragrance oils come in various sizes, from 10ml, 50ml, 100ml, 200ml, 500ml, and 1 liter, all in protective amber plastic dropper bottles. Are these fragrance oils for candle making cruelty-free and vegan-friendly? Yes, Essican Purelife takes pride in offering fragrances that have not been tested on animals, making them cruelty-free. They are also vegan-friendly, aligning with ethical choices, so you can enjoy delightful scents without compromising your values. Can these fragrance oils be applied directly to the skin? No, these aromatherapy diffuser oils are not recommended for direct skin application. They are specifically designed for soap and bath bomb making. It's important to use them in crafting projects to ensure safety and satisfaction. What makes the aroma of these fragrance oils stand out? Essican Purelife's Fragrance Oils for Diffuser are known for their exquisite scents. They offer a wide range of essential oil perfume scents, including options like musk essential oil and fragrance oil.
